proposals.label: enable-grep-context
proposals.predicted_effect: Estimated improvement: +2 to +3 tasks, from 8/15 (53%) to 10–11/15 (67–73%). The palette/t1 task shown as failed is a prime candidate for context-aided fixing. Additionally, some of the 7 unseen failing tasks likely fail because the agent lacks visibility into how its changes interact with the rest
proposals.rationale: The current scaffold has GREP_CONTEXT=False, meaning the agent never invokes the gather_context() function. proposals.steer: the agent edits without gathering enough surrounding code context

proposals.label: expand-test-output-visibility
proposals.predicted_effect: Estimated +2-3 tasks solved (8→10-11/15). Tasks currently failing due to incomplete failure diagnostics will benefit from seeing full error output, enabling more targeted and correct fixes on first or second attempt.
proposals.rationale: The summarize_tests() function only shows the last 1200 chars of test output. This often truncates critical failure messages, stack traces, and assertion details. The model must see complete failure information to diagnose problems accurately rather than making blind edits. Increasing this to 4000+
proposals.steer: the agent never inspects the failing test output before editing
proposals.targeted_failure_mode: Test output is truncated at 1200 characters, hiding failure details the model needs before editing

proposals.label: robust-parse-with-feedback
proposals.predicted_effect: +2 to +3 on train solve rate by reducing wasted attempts on fixable formatting errors and enabling the model to learn the exact format requirements through concrete feedback
proposals.rationale: The current regex is strict about newline placement before '### END', and generic error feedback 'no parseable blocks' doesn't help the model learn the correct format. Many models omit the final newline or wrap responses in markdown fences. By (1) making the regex more lenient to handle missing newl
proposals.steer: the agent misformats its patch so no edit is applied

candidate_summ.label: backtracking-on-test-failure

proposals.label: backtracking-on-test-failure
proposals.predicted_effect: Improves from 8/15 to ~11/15 (+3 tasks). Error compounding was defeating recovery attempts; with backtracking, the 7 failing tasks now get 3 truly independent attempts instead of 3 nested attempts on progressively broken code. Conservative estimate accounts for failures with other root causes.
proposals.rationale: Currently, when a test run fails, the agent proceeds to the next attempt without reverting changes, causing subsequent attempts to build on broken code. This compounds errors—if attempt 1 introduces a subtle bug that causes test failures, attempt 2 tries to fix symptoms while attempt 3 works on alre
proposals.steer: the agent gives up too early / does not backtrack after a failed attempt
proposals.targeted_failure_mode: agent does not backtrack after failed attempt, compounding errors across retries

proposals.label: enable-grep-context
proposals.rationale: The gather_context() function already exists and searches the repository for references to editable file base names, but it is disabled by GREP_CONTEXT=False.
